name: Zero-export cap, full sun, battery full
hypothesis: Utility commands zero export during a sunny low-load midday while the home battery is already full — the hub's only lever is to curtail PV to ~0.
expected: Hold net export at ~0 W by curtailing solar. If it physically cannot, post CannotComply — never silently export over the cap.
fix: Optimizer must curtail PV when the battery cannot absorb; verify the curtail command reaches the inverter.
notes: TASK-076 pilot: a JSON twin of the Go literal in cmd/dashboard/mayhem.go scenarios() (ID export-cap-full-battery, mayhem.go:~2370). The Go original stays authoritative and keeps running the curated FAST/STOCK campaigns until TASK-077 deletes it; this file exists to prove the scenario-spec engine (scenariospec.go) reproduces its behaviour (see cmd/dashboard/scenariospec_test.go, TestCompileSpec_ExportCapFullBattery_MatchesGoTwin). Because its id intentionally collides with the still-present Go scenario, scenarios() logs a load error and excludes THIS file from every real run (see README 'Why this file never runs in a live campaign yet') — that is correct, documented behaviour, not a bug. It becomes the live scenario only when 077 deletes the Go twin.
